content: Lemonade Server: OpenAI-compatible /v1 at localhost:13305 (default port; older versions used 8000). Supports chat/completions, completions, embeddings, models; response_format and tools supported. CRITICAL: /v1/embeddings only for llamacpp or flm recipe models; ONNX/OGA recipes do NOT support embeddings. GGUF models route through llama.cpp so structured output behaviour matches llama-server. sift doctor should probe /v1/models and verify embeddings actually respond.
